x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Custom topic blocks and client scripts can break Now Assist VA generative AI responses and intent matching.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Review custom VA topics and test with Now Assist VA enabled in sub-production. Document any conflicts between custom topic logic and Now Assist generative AI responses.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_8603e33acfd903108935fb251d851c21
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[Custom topic blocks and client scripts can break Now Assist VA generative AI responses and intent matching.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>VA Customization Risk</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('sys_cs_topic');
    ga.addQuery('active', true);
    ga.addQuery('sys_created_by', 'NOT IN', 'glide.maint,system,admin,fred.luddy');
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' custom active VA topics';

    if (count <= 20) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Low VA customization risk (' + count + ' custom topics). Now Assist VA generative AI responses and intent matching are unlikely to encounter conflicts.'
        };
    } else if (count <= 50) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' custom active VA topics. Moderate customization — test Now Assist VA with all custom topics enabled in sub-production before go-live.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'High VA customization risk: ' + count + ' custom active topics. Extensive customization may interfere with Now Assist VA generative AI responses and intent matching accuracy.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>VIRTUAL_AGENT</module>
<number>CHK0006140</number>
<order>150</order>
<remediation_guidance>Review custom VA topics and test with Now Assist VA enabled in sub-production. Document any conflicts between custom topic logic and Now Assist generative AI responses.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>8603e33acfd903108935fb251d851c21</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
